column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing beautifully and deeply" | TEXT="ごきげんよう" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Looking up with a gentle smile" | TEXT="春めいてまいりました" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Putting hands neatly on lap" | TEXT="お変わりありませんか" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Offering a gentle nod" | TEXT="いかがお過ごしですか" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Looking at flying cherry petals warmly" | TEXT="暖かくなりましたね" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Covering mouth playfully with a small laugh" | TEXT="おほほ" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Holding hands to chest in gratitude" | TEXT="ありがとうございます" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing slightly" | TEXT="お世話になっております" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Looking warmly into eyes" | TEXT="お会いできて嬉しいです"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Looking apologetic, hands together" | TEXT="申し訳ございません" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Looking sincerely sorry, bowing" | TEXT="お詫び申し上げます" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Looking slightly concerned" | TEXT="お体ご自愛ください" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Offering a warm cup of tea" | TEXT="一服いかがですか" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Sighing softly in relief" | TEXT="安心いたしました" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Cheering gently with a small fist" | TEXT="陰ながら応援しております" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Nodding firmly" | TEXT="承知いたしました" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Showing an elegant okay symbol" | TEXT="かしこまりました" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing cleanly" | TEXT="お疲れ様でございます"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling purely with hands together" | TEXT="おめでとうございます" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Clapping hands softly" | TEXT="お見事でした" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Looking proud and happy for someone" | TEXT="素晴らしいですね" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Looking shy, avoiding eyes slightly" | TEXT="恐縮です" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Shaking head left and right gracefully" | TEXT="とんでもございません" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Looking humble" | TEXT="滅相もございません" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Pointing to a gift neatly wrapped" | TEXT="心ばかりの品です" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing with a wrapped gift" | TEXT="お納めください" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling mysteriously" | TEXT="ご想像にお任せします"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Tilting head slightly confused" | TEXT="左様でございますか" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Pondering gracefully" | TEXT="いかがいたしましょう" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Looking surprised elegantly" | TEXT="まぁ" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a hand over mouth in subtle shock" | TEXT="存じませんでした" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Tearing up a little" | TEXT="胸がいっぱいです" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Wiping tear politely with a handkerchief" | TEXT="お恥ずかしい" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling happily" | TEXT="おぼしめし感謝します" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Showing empty hands" | TEXT="手ぶらで失礼します" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Offering a supportive touch on shoulder" | TEXT="お気になさらず"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Looking sleepy gracefully" | TEXT="夜分遅くに失礼します" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Yawning behind a beautiful fan" | TEXT="ふわぁ" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Rubbing eyes gently" | TEXT="おやすみなさいませ" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Looking up refreshed" | TEXT="おはようございます" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Taking a deep breath" | TEXT="よき朝ですね" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Stretching delicately" | TEXT="さぁ、参りましょう" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Waving gently to say goodbye" | TEXT="またお目にかかりましょう" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Looking back affectionately" | TEXT="お気をつけて" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing slowly and deeply" | TEXT="ごめんくださいませ"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="Walking gracefully" | TEXT="お邪魔いたします" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Sitting politely seiza" | TEXT="おじゃまします" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Looking lonely" | TEXT="名残惜しいです" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Panting slightly" | TEXT="お急ぎでしょうか" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Running elegantly" | TEXT="ただいま参ります" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Catching breath" | TEXT="お待たせいたしました" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Holding chest to calm down" | TEXT="失礼いたしました" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Looking out to the raining sky" | TEXT="お足元の悪い中" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Smiling softly in quiet reflection" | TEXT="では、また"
